item.title: 安全哨兵：通过 EXECUTE-ASK-REFUSE 路由进行上下文感知人工干预
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13594v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM agents act on real-world environments through tool calls, and a single misjudged action can cause irreversible harm. The standard safeguard is a guard model that labels each proposed action as safe or unsafe, but this binary view conflates two distinct decisions: whet
